title: baldellia ranunculoides var. tangerina
intro: Baldellia ranunculoides var. tangerina is a variant of the aquatic plant Baldellia ranunculoides, also known as Lesser Water-plantain, which is a flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Baldellia ranunculoides var. tangerina are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Baldellia ranunculoides var. tangerina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
